description: You are a media analyst. Using the movie dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TaskData\movie_metadata.csv, build a Power BI report that analyzes box office trends by primary genre and decade. The data requires processing to extract the first value from the pipe-delimited (|) genres column as Primary_Genre, filter out null gross or budget values, and bin title_year into 10-year Decade groups. The report must feature a Matrix visual displaying the average gross by Primary_Genre (rows) and Decade (columns), and a Scatter Chart plotting gross against budget categorized by Primary_Genre. Export the Matrix visual data to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TaskData\genre_stats.csv and save the final report as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TaskData\IMDB_Analysis.pbix.
